title: selaginella subdiaphana
intro: Selaginella subdiaphana, also known as the 'Rainbow Plant' due to its vibrant colors, is a species of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, headache, and respiratory problems, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and improving cognitive function. Herbal preparations of Selaginella subdiaphana are commonly made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
